data.content:
The formula in the image can be written in LaTeX as:

```latex
\mathbf{y} = \mathcal{F}(\mathbf{x}, \{W_i\}) + \mathbf{x}.
```

This will produce the same output as shown in the image.

data.content: \mathbf { y } = \mathcal { F } ( \mathbf { x } , \{ W _ { i } \} ) + W _ { s } \mathbf { x } .
